untranslatable_reason: Adam Top pattern requires detection of two distinct peaks separated by 5-7 weeks with <6% price variation and a large dip between them. This multi-bar temporal pattern with specific inter-peak timing and relative price relationships cannot be fully expressed with point-in-time indicators alone. Converted conditions approximate the setup (uptrend, narrow spikes/shooting stars, overbought) but cannot validate the precise dual-peak geometry or optimal 5-7 week spacing requirement.
